understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based environment and complete all levels by activating goal cells. Each level contains one or more goal cells that require the player's carried piece to simultaneously match specific shape, color, and rotation attributes. The player must step onto a goal cell only when all attributes match its requirements.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game involves managing stamina with each move, losing a life when stamina reaches zero, and losing all lives ends the game. The grid contains modifier tiles that change the piece's attributes: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. The player can move in four directions (north, south, east, west) but may be blocked by walls. understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based environment and complete all levels by activating goal cells. Each level contains one or more goal cells that require the player's carried piece to simultaneously match specific shape, color, and rotation attributes. The player must step onto a goal cell only when all attributes match its requirements.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game involves managing stamina with each move, losing a life when stamina reaches zero, and losing all lives ends the game. The grid contains modifier tiles that change the piece's attributes: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. The player can move in four directions (north, south, east, west) but may be blocked by walls. The recent actions show that the player's piece had a rotation of 270°, while the goal required 0°, and there was a rotation_changer tile at [19, 30] to fix this mismatch. The player attempted multiple moves, including some that were blocked by walls, indicating the need to navigate around obstacles to reach modifier tiles or goals.
